title: RatioLemmas
summary: Proves ratios of neighboring closed coefficients needed to discharge the recurrence equations.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Proves ratios of neighboring closed coefficients needed to discharge the recurrence equations.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows PolyGJMSoperators/OR/Coefficients/RatioLemmas.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The first-slot recurrence multiplier appearing in Lemma 3.1. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is 2 times w₁ plus 2 times w₂ plus n minus 2 times N : ℚ minus 2 times I.b minus 2 times I.c.
correspondence.leanType: def ORFirstSlotMultiplier {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The second-slot recurrence multiplier appearing in Lemma 3.1. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is 2 times w₁ plus 2 times w₂ plus n minus 2 times N : ℚ minus 2 times I.b minus 2 times I.c.
correspondence.leanType: def ORSecondSlotMultiplier {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The left factor in the first recurrence equation. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₁ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is 2 times w₁ plus n minus 2 times I.b minus 2.
correspondence.leanType: def ORFirstSlotLeftFactor {N : ℕ} (n w₁ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The left factor in the second recurrence equation. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₂ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is 2 times w₂ plus n minus 2 times I.c minus 2.
correspondence.leanType: def ORSecondSlotLeftFactor {N : ℕ} (n w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Expanded form of the Gamma-ratio part after moving one unit from the output power to the first input power. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\;ha\colon 0 < a_{\mathrm{I}},\quad \operatorname{ORRegularA} n w₁ w₂ (I.\operatorname{move\_a\_to\_b} \operatorname{ha}) = \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORAlpha} N n w₁ w₂) ((b_{\mathrm{I}} + 1) + c_{\mathrm{I}}) \cdot \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORBeta} N n w₁) (N - (b_{\mathrm{I}} + 1)) \cdot \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORGamma} N n w₂) (N - c_{\mathrm{I}})
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_move_a_to_b_expanded {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORRegularA n w₁ w₂ (I.move_a_to_b ha) = pochhammerQ (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂) ((I.b + 1) + I.c) * pochhammerQ (ORBeta N n w₁) (N - (I.b + 1)) * pochhammerQ (ORGamma N n w₂) (N - I.c)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Expanded form of the Gamma-ratio part after moving one unit from the output power to the second input power. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\;ha\colon 0 < a_{\mathrm{I}},\quad \operatorname{ORRegularA} n w₁ w₂ (I.\operatorname{move\_a\_to\_c} \operatorname{ha}) = \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORAlpha} N n w₁ w₂) (b_{\mathrm{I}} + (c_{\mathrm{I}} + 1)) \cdot \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORBeta} N n w₁) (N - b_{\mathrm{I}}) \cdot \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORGamma} N n w₂) (N - (c_{\mathrm{I}} + 1))
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_move_a_to_c_expanded {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORRegularA n w₁ w₂ (I.move_a_to_c ha) = pochhammerQ (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂) (I.b + (I.c + 1)) * pochhammerQ (ORBeta N n w₁) (N - I.b) * pochhammerQ (ORGamma N n w₂) (N - (I.c + 1))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The first recurrence equation for the Gamma-ratio part. This is the local identity from which the first-slot defect cancellation proof should proceed. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is for every ha : 0 < I.a, ORFirst Slot Left Factor n w₁ I times ORRegular A n w₁ w₂ I.move a to b ha equals -ORFirst Slot Multiplier n w₁ w₂ I times ORRegular A n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{ORRegularAFirstRecurrence}(n,w₁,w₂,I)=\forall \operatorname{ha} \colon 0 < a_{\mathrm{I}}, \operatorname{ORFirstSlotLeftFactor} n w₁ I \cdot \operatorname{ORRegularA} n w₁ w₂ (I.\operatorname{move\_a\_to\_b} \operatorname{ha}) = -\operatorname{ORFirstSlotMultiplier} n w₁ w₂ I \cdot \operatorname{ORRegularA} n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularAFirstRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The second recurrence equation for the Gamma-ratio part. This is the local identity from which the second-slot defect cancellation proof should proceed. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is for every ha : 0 < I.a, ORSecond Slot Left Factor n w₂ I times ORRegular A n w₁ w₂ I.move a to c ha equals -ORSecond Slot Multiplier n w₁ w₂ I times ORRegular A n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{ORRegularASecondRecurrence}(n,w₁,w₂,I)=\forall \operatorname{ha} \colon 0 < a_{\mathrm{I}}, \operatorname{ORSecondSlotLeftFactor} n w₂ I \cdot \operatorname{ORRegularA} n w₁ w₂ (I.\operatorname{move\_a\_to\_c} \operatorname{ha}) = -\operatorname{ORSecondSlotMultiplier} n w₁ w₂ I \cdot \operatorname{ORRegularA} n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularASecondRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₁ of type ℚ, I of type ORIndex N, and ha of type 0 < I.a, ORFirst Slot Left Factor n w₁ I equals 2 times ORBeta N n w₁ plus N minus I.b plus 1 : the natural numbers : ℚ.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\;ha\colon 0 < a_{\mathrm{I}},\quad \operatorname{ORFirstSlotLeftFactor} n w₁ I = 2 \cdot (\operatorname{ORBeta} N n w₁ + ((N - (b_{\mathrm{I}} + 1) \colon \mathbb{N}) \colon \mathbb{Q}))
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORFirstSlotLeftFactor_eq_two_beta_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORFirstSlotLeftFactor n w₁ I = 2 * (ORBeta N n w₁ + ((N - (I.b + 1) : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₂ of type ℚ, I of type ORIndex N, and ha of type 0 < I.a, ORSecond Slot Left Factor n w₂ I equals 2 times ORGamma N n w₂ plus N minus I.c plus 1 : the natural numbers : ℚ.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\;ha\colon 0 < a_{\mathrm{I}},\quad \operatorname{ORSecondSlotLeftFactor} n w₂ I = 2 \cdot (\operatorname{ORGamma} N n w₂ + ((N - (c_{\mathrm{I}} + 1) \colon \mathbb{N}) \colon \mathbb{Q}))
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORSecondSlotLeftFactor_eq_two_gamma_last {N : ℕ} (n w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORSecondSlotLeftFactor n w₂ I = 2 * (ORGamma N n w₂ + ((N - (I.c + 1) : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and I of type ORIndex N, -ORFirst Slot Multiplier n w₁ w₂ I equals 2 times ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ plus I.b plus I.c : ℚ.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\quad -\operatorname{ORFirstSlotMultiplier} n w₁ w₂ I = 2 \cdot (\operatorname{ORAlpha} N n w₁ w₂ + (b_{\mathrm{I}} + c_{\mathrm{I}} \colon \mathbb{Q}))
correspondence.leanType: theorem neg_ORSlotMultiplier_eq_two_alpha_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : -ORFirstSlotMultiplier n w₁ w₂ I = 2 * (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + ((I.b + I.c : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and I of type ORIndex N, -ORSecond Slot Multiplier n w₁ w₂ I equals 2 times ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ plus I.b plus I.c : ℚ.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\quad -\operatorname{ORSecondSlotMultiplier} n w₁ w₂ I = 2 \cdot (\operatorname{ORAlpha} N n w₁ w₂ + (b_{\mathrm{I}} + c_{\mathrm{I}} \colon \mathbb{Q}))
correspondence.leanType: theorem neg_ORSecondSlotMultiplier_eq_two_alpha_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : -ORSecondSlotMultiplier n w₁ w₂ I = 2 * (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + ((I.b + I.c : ℕ) : ℚ))

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and I of type ORIndex N, ORRegular AFirst Recurrence n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_firstRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORRegularAFirstRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and I of type ORIndex N, ORRegular ASecond Recurrence n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_secondRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORRegularASecondRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The regular Gamma-ratio coefficient satisfies both Lemma 3.1 recurrences. In symbols, the proposition is the statement displayed below.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\quad (\forall I \colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N, \operatorname{ORRegularAFirstRecurrence} n w₁ w₂ I) \land (\forall I \colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N, \operatorname{ORRegularASecondRecurrence} n w₁ w₂ I)
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_satisfiesLemma31Recurrences {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularAFirstRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I) ∧ (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularASecondRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I)

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
